name: Zscaler
description: AI Broker + Agent Registry broker MCP and agent-to-agent (A2A) traffic at the network control plane; added AI red-teaming for MCP servers.

name: Palo Alto Networks
description: Prisma AIRS for runtime AI security, plus Idira (built on its CyberArk acquisition) for agentic identity.

name: Cisco AI Defense
description: Runtime protections against tool abuse and supply-chain manipulation at the MCP layer.

name: Cloudflare
description: MCP gateway / edge controls for agent traffic.

name: Akamai
description: Edge agentic-security framework: agent identity, traffic analysis, 'Know Your Agent.'

name: CrowdStrike
description: Falcon AIDR (GA Dec 2025): Maps users/prompts/models/agents/MCP servers; validates MCP comms via MCP proxy; Continuous Identity for Agents (SPIFFE).

name: Microsoft Agent 365
description: Control plane + unified agent registry (GA 2026). Discovers agents & MCP servers; pairs with Entra Agent ID (identity) and Defender (MCP asset-context mapping from Jun 2026). Supersedes retired Entra 'Agent registry' blade.

name: SailPoint
description: Agentic Fabric for agent and non-human identity governance; acquiring Entro (Tel Aviv) for deep secrets discovery and NHI scanning.

name: Beyond Identity
description: Process/OS-level policy enforcement — controls which agents launch, restricts tools/scope, terminates violating sessions.

name: Saviynt
description: Agent Access Gateway with Intent-Aware Runtime Authorization.

name: Silverfort
description: Non-human / agent identity protection.

name: BeyondTrust
description: PathfinderAI + MCP Server for privilege-centric agent identity.

name: Zenity
description: Agentic AI security posture management (AISPM); step-level MCP context inspection.

name: Straiker
description: AI-native agentic security: Discover (inventory + MCP-vuln DB), Ascend (red team), Defend (runtime).

name: Noma Security
description: AISPM + Agent Access Control: discover/govern agents & MCP servers; real-time injection/exfil detection.

name: NeuralTrust
description: TrustGate (gateway), TrustGuard (runtime), TrustLens (posture). Raised $20M; EU-heavy (Iberia, Banc Sabadell).

name: TrojAI
description: Defend for MCP — monitors traffic to/from MCP servers with runtime enforcement; blocks rogue servers.

name: General Analysis
description: Automated agentic red-teaming / exploitability (maps tool graph, tests MCP abuse). Free GA Guard classifiers (OSS).

name: Lasso Security
description: Real-time prompt-injection blocking, PII masking, MCP tool reputation scoring.

name: Operant AI
description: MCP gateway w/ runtime protection + NHI security; free 2026 Guide to Securing MCP and Shadow Escape research.

name: Cyera
description: Data security / lineage — what data agents and their tools actually touch (raised $600M, ~$12B val).

name: MintMCP
description: Enterprise MCP gateway: SSO, RBAC, virtual MCP bundling; managed, no infra overhead.

name: TrueFoundry
description: MCP gateway / control plane: OAuth identity injection, per-tool RBAC, immutable audit logs.

name: Runlayer
description: Access control + rate-limiting for high-volume agent orchestration at scale.

name: Lunar.dev MCPX
description: MCP observability, rate limiting, compliance.

name: MCP Manager
description: MCP gateway with guardrails, RBAC, PII detection, centralized provisioning.

name: Helmet Security
description: End-to-end MCP lifecycle protection.

name: Manufact
description: MCP infrastructure platform (YC-backed).

name: IBM ContextForge Enterprise
description: Enterprise deployment of IBM ContextForge with managed support.

name: Backslash Security
description: MCP scanning, hardening, real-time MCP proxy for IDE / 'vibe coding' workflows.

name: GuardionAI
description: Runtime guardrail + security gateway enforcing policy on MCP tool calls; app-layer (no network controls).
